suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a rule that when workers add a new API endpoint, they must update openapi.yaml in the same feature (or explicitly document why the endpoint is intentionally undocumented).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature token-metadata-endpoint added GET /token-metadata but openapi.yaml still only documents /health, /chains, /compare, and /quote.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit frontend safety rule: escape all user-controlled values (including localStorage-derived fields) before interpolating into HTML text or attribute contexts.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature local-tokenlist-management escaped address/symbol but not chainId in data attributes, creating inconsistent handling of user-controlled localStorage values.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify warning-color policy by either adding #CC7A00 to the canonical palette with verified WCAG contrast guidance or requiring workers to use only already-approved colors.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both tokenlist chain warnings and unrecognized-token warnings use #CC7A00, but .factory/library/color-system.md does not currently include it.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that small server-side normalization/safety changes (e.g., viem getAddress normalization) still require a targeted automated test, even when the primary feature is UI-heavy.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: In unrecognized-address-popup, config.ts changed server-side address handling but no targeted automated test was added for the normalization path.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Define expected Uniswap tokenlist version field format for export/import interoperability (object {major, minor, patch} vs string), so future workers implement a consistent contract.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature export-import-integration exports version as string '1.0.0', which differs from canonical Uniswap tokenlist schema shape.

rejectedObservations.observation: No change needed to scrutiny-validator skill because the reviewer reported this run's workflow aligned with the current procedure.
Extract inline client-side logic into separate modules solely to enable more unit tests.
localTokenList save/export asymmetry on optional version field requires immediate shared-state update.
